title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra, UniFi Video Camera G5 Dome Ultra, white
description: UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra is the 5th generation camera from the UniFi Video series. It has a 1/2.4" CMOS sensor with 4MP resolution (2688 x 1512 px, 16:9) @ 30 FPS . The fixed lens has a viewing angle of 102.4° horizontally , 54.9° vertically and 120.6° diagonally. The camera is equipped with (1) 10/100Mbps Ethernet port through which the camera is powered using POE 802.3af or passive POE with input voltage 37 - 57 V DC . For night mode, the camera is equipped with an IR illuminator with a range of… Camera (2) Metal holder Set of screws and nuts with metric thread Set of screws and dowels Drilling template Security pin
